title: byzh-picgen
description: This is a mod to draw in minecraft and save in your computer.
body:
This mod is to draw pictures using minecraft blocks,and then you can export the area your choose as a png saving in your computer.

Using byzh-picgen modblocks **only**！

Other block will be changed to transparent pixel.

After choosing，the picture will be saved in **config/byzh** as png.
